Understanding compatibility scores

Numerology compatibility isn't a simple pass/fail. Two very different numbers can create a dynamic, growth-oriented relationship — while two identical numbers can feel suffocating.

Our algorithm looks at three layers:

  • Life path compatibility — how well your core journeys align.
  • Destiny harmony — how your ultimate goals interact.
  • Vedic planetary friendship — whether your ruling planets are friends, neutrals, or enemies in Vedic astrology.

The overall score combines these with weightings from classical numerology texts. Higher scores indicate more natural ease; lower scores indicate more friction — which isn't automatically bad, just more growth-demanding.
